database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "benguela")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

RETURN p.ID AS paper

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Benguela'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Benguela'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "pago pago")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_2>>))
}

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Pago Pago'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Pago Pago'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "annaba")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Annaba'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (?conference_name = "Escaldes")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?conference_name = "Mascara")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_location "Andorra La Vella" .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_2>>))
}

RETURN p.ID AS paper, p1.ID AS person

RETURN p.ID AS person, p.first_name AS first_name, p.last_name AS last_name

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Andorra La Vella'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Andorra La Vella'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "tirane")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
